top_stories.title: Building permit approvals post steepest drop in 8 months
top_stories.summary: THE NUMBER of approved building permits declined by 11.6% in May from a year earlier, the sharpest drop in eight months, amid rising construction costs and high borrowing rates.

top_stories.title: Construction permits down 12% in May
top_stories.summary: Construction projects in the country based on approved building permits declined both in number and value in May from a year ago, according to the Philippine Statistics Authority.
